name: BLVD Ansel
doormanNote: Building website states 'Lobby w/ our 24/7 concierge service' on the amenities page.
has2BRorDenNote: Offers 2BR units and 1BR+den configurations per listing descriptions.
balconyNote: Terraces and balconies listed as a unit feature (select units); building site notes not all units include balcony.
inUnitLaundryNote: In-unit washers and dryers confirmed on building amenities page and third-party listings.
petFriendlyNote: Pet-friendly with cats and dogs allowed; pet spa/dog grooming area on site.
packageRoomNote: Package receiving listed as community amenity on RentCafe.
unitClimateNote: Air conditioning confirmed in units; no source specifies individual thermostats vs. building-controlled systems.
wellMaintainedNote: Built 2022, 18 stories, 250 units. 2026 reviews give 4.5/5 overall with 4.5 for maintenance. One RentCafe reviewer noted minor cosmetic wear (nick marks, peeling wallpaper) after 4 years; other reviews describe the building as super clean with amazing amenities. Net picture is well-maintained for a building of this age.
bathroomsNote: 2BR units have 2 baths (confirmed across RentCafe and ApartmentList floor plan data).
approxRentRange: $3,163 to $4,117/month for 2BR (per ApartmentList and RentCafe as of June 2026)
